title: Charlene Jackson
compiled_truth: Charlene Jackson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-11-06), Charlene Jackson sent 19 and received 155 emails, totalling 174 interactions. Top correspondents: [Celeste Roberts](people/celeste-roberts) (8), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (6), [Richard Causey](people/richard-causey) (6), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (6), [Victoria Mcdaniel](people/victoria-mcdaniel) (5).
